allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('assets/data/regions.json'\)\); hre=[r for r in data['regions'] if 'hre' in r.get\('id',''\).lower\(\) or 'holy' in r.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or r.get\('controller',''\)=='hre' or 'german' in r.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'bohemia' in r.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'austria' in r.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'bavaria' in r.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'saxony' in r.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'prussia' in r.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'silesia' in r.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'moravia' in r.get\('name',''\).lower\(\)]; print\(f'HRE bölge sayisi: {len\(hre\)}'\); [print\(f'  {r[\\"id\\"]} | {r[\\"name\\"]} | owner={r.get\(\\"owner\\",\\"?\\"\)} | shape={r.get\(\\"shape_source\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) for r in hre[:30]]")
